meaning: adj.木造的,用木材的,森林的
examples: The door of which was heavily timbered with oak, and studded with iron spikes.
Clem decided it was time to purchase a new saw to help clear his heavily timbered property .
Though designs vary, a common style features a sloping, single-gabled timbered roof and small windows.
Edelweiss is a Heidi-style alpine hideout in the middle of the town, with cosy timbered rooms featuring wild-flower-painted pine bed-heads.
Scenic roads dip and rise through the region, past farmhouses huddling on hillsides and half-timbered towns with a rustic, fairy-tale-like prettiness.
